## Summary

What changed, and why?

## Type of change

- [ ] Prompt/framework change
- [ ] Script change
- [ ] Documentation change

## Test plan

List the commands or review steps used to verify the change.

```bash
scripts/validate-manifest
scripts/check-assessment example-ai-physio-scribe
```

## Privacy check

- [ ] No `.env`, credentials, private team profile, private assessments, or customer data included.
- [ ] Any new market or competitor claims include sources or are clearly marked fictional.
